title: Proteomic Profiling of Arabidopsis thaliana Under Drought Stress
description: LC-MS/MS proteomic analysis of Arabidopsis thaliana leaf tissue under controlled drought conditions.

studies.title: Quantitative Proteomics of Drought-Stressed Arabidopsis
studies.description: TMT-labeled quantitative proteomics comparing control vs drought-stressed plants at 3 time points.
